records.title: Python Crash Course
records.author: Eric Matthes
records.description: A hands-on project-based introduction to programming with Python for absolute beginners.

records.title: Fluent Python
records.author: Luciano Ramalho
records.description: Clear concise and effective programming with advanced Python features and idioms.

records.title: Python Cookbook
records.author: David Beazley
records.description: Recipes for mastering Python covering data structures algorithms and concurrency.

records.title: Effective Python
records.author: Brett Slatkin
records.description: Ninety specific ways to write better Python code with best practices.

records.title: Learning Rust
records.author: Jim Blandy
records.description: An introduction to systems programming with Rust focusing on safety and performance.

records.title: Programming Rust
records.author: Jim Blandy
records.description: Fast safe systems development covering ownership concurrency and unsafe code.

records.title: The Rust Programming Language
records.author: Steve Klabnik
records.description: The official Rust book covering all language features from basics to advanced topics.

records.title: FastAPI Modern Python
records.author: Bill Lubanovic
records.description: Building web APIs with FastAPI using modern Python type hints and async features.

records.title: Architecture Patterns with Python
records.author: Harry Percival
records.description: Enabling test driven development domain driven design and event driven microservices.

records.title: Go Programming Language
records.author: Alan Donovan
records.description: The definitive guide to Go covering the core language standard library and tools.

records.title: Concurrency in Go
records.author: Katherine Cox-Buday
records.description: Tools and techniques for building concurrent applications with goroutines and channels.

records.title: JavaScript The Good Parts
records.author: Douglas Crockford
records.description: Unearthing the excellence in JavaScript and the subset of features worth using.

records.title: Eloquent JavaScript
records.author: Marijn Haverbeke
records.description: A modern introduction to programming covering JavaScript the browser and Node.

records.title: Designing Data Intensive Applications
records.author: Martin Kleppmann
records.description: The big ideas behind reliable scalable and maintainable distributed systems.

records.title: Clean Code
records.author: Robert Martin
records.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship covering naming functions and testing.
